_comment: NPC: Heng Yue Sect Recruiter (恒岳派招弟子). Phase A.6 (PA-6) — the Day 3 aptitude-test ceremony recruiter. A low-realm cultivator dispatched by the Heng Yue Sect to conduct the annual recruitment drive through the mortal villages of Zhao Country. Spawns near the player on Day 3 of the mortal origin via AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent. Right-clicked by the player via AptitudeTestCeremonyHandler to run the aptitude test and call MortalOriginHandler.completeMortalOrigin(). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.4: the Day 3 trigger is the BASE PATH; per the Opportunity Engine philosophy, the player can also deviate (early discovery on the road toward Heng Yue Mountain — future v2 work, NOT in PA-6 scope). Prime Directive: Reality is objective — this recruiter exists in the world independent of the player's perception.
name: Heng Yue Sect Recruiter
cultivation: Qi Condensation 3 (low-realm cultivator sent to test mortals)
relationship_to_wanglin: incidental — does not personally know Wang Lin; one of many low-realm outer-sect functionaries the Heng Yue Sect dispatches annually

perception_tiers.mortal: A figure in gray robes. His gaze is heavy, appraising.
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: A Qi Condensation cultivator of the Heng Yue Sect. Outer-sect functionary, here on a recruitment drive.
perception_tiers.foundation: Qi Condensation 3, late stage. Bored by mortal villages. Will return to the sect by sundown.
perception_tiers.core_formation: Low-realm recruiter. Carries a jade testing stone and a stack of outer-disciple tokens. No threat.

note: Phase A.6 (PA-6) ceremony recruiter. Spawns near the player on Day 3 of the mortal origin (AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent). Right-click via AptitudeTestCeremonyHandler runs the aptitude test sequence and calls MortalOriginHandler.completeMortalOrigin() to unlock cultivation. Recruiter is force-configured in Java (character_id, displayName, cultivationRealm, max_hp) so the entity is properly identified even if this JSON file is not yet registered in npcs/_index.json (TODO for follow-up subagent). Recruiter respawns at next dawn if killed before the player completes the test (LivingDeathEvent → CeremonyScheduler.markRecruiterDied → AptitudeTestCeremonyEvent spawn-at-dawn logic).

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
